flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Johnson & Wales University-Providence are 46% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($43.4k vs $80.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Johnson & Wales University-Providence vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.9k vs 5.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Johnson & Wales University-Providence fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (51.4% → 39.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Johnson & Wales University-Providence rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.3k → $42.4k).
